name: Polk County Public Schools
districtFact: Polk County Public Schools serves families across Lakeland, Winter Haven, Bartow, and Central Florida communities between Tampa and Orlando, where school calendar planning often involves commuter schedules, theme park travel, and storm make-up day planning.

about.title: About Polk County Public Schools
about.content: Polk County Public Schools serves students across Central Florida communities including Lakeland, Winter Haven, Bartow, Haines City, Lake Wales, Auburndale, and nearby rural areas. The district calendar matters for families who coordinate school transportation, childcare, theme park travel, youth sports, and storm-season make-up days across a large county between Tampa and Orlando.

about.title: How to Use This Polk Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes the official Polk County Public Schools calendar PDF in a searchable format for parents and students. Use it for first day, last day, early dismissal, fall break, winter break, spring break, and storm make-up planning, then confirm school-specific orientation details, testing, athletics, graduation ceremonies, and emergency schedule changes through PCPS and your assigned school.

customSections.label: Polk County School Calendar Quick Answers
customSections.content: The most searched Polk County school calendar questions are the first day, spring break, the last day, and whether storm make-up dates could affect family plans.

groups.label: Fast answers
items: Polk County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on Tuesday, August 11, 2026.
Polk County Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.
The last student day is Thursday, May 27, 2027, with a 150-minute early dismissal.

customSections.label: Important Polk County Dates Parents Should Know
customSections.content: Polk County families usually need more than the first day and spring break. The 2026-2027 calendar includes a full Fall Break, ten 150-minute early dismissal dates, teacher planning days, grading-period dates, and storm make-up days that can affect childcare, travel, and after-school transportation.

groups.label: Vacation and childcare planning
items: Fall Break runs November 23-27, 2026, but November 23 and November 24 are also listed as storm make-up days, so families should verify those dates before booking non-refundable travel.
Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 5, 2027, with students returning on January 6.
Spring Break runs March 15-19, 2027 and is the main spring travel window for PCPS families.

groups.label: School-day logistics
items: Ten student early dismissal dates release students 150 minutes early, which can affect pickup, bus timing, after-school care, and work schedules.

Teacher workdays and staff development dates are planning days for staff, not regular student attendance days, so families should treat them as no-school logistics dates unless PCPS announces otherwise.
The January 4 teacher workday and January 5 staff development day help separate Winter Break from the student return date on January 6.
Storm make-up days are planning flags, not guaranteed closures; PCPS may use them if severe weather affects the school year.

customSections.label: Polk County Calendar Verification Process
customSections.content: MySchoolDates verifies the Polk County school calendar against the official PCPS calendar PDF before publishing the searchable date list and calendar import file. This section explains why families should treat the official district calendar as the source of record while using this page for faster planning.

groups.label: How this Polk calendar is checked
items: We check the official Polk County Public Schools calendar page and the 2026-2027 English School Calendar PDF.
We confirm the first student day, last student day, fall break, winter break, spring break, storm make-up days, and 150-minute early dismissal dates against the official PDF.
We mark the page with the review date after the extracted dates match the official source used for this school year.

groups.label: What families should still verify
items: Storm make-up days may change if PCPS adjusts the calendar after severe weather.
School-specific orientation, athletics, graduation ceremonies, testing windows, and transportation notices may be announced separately by individual schools.
The downloadable calendar file is generated from the reviewed records on this page and should be checked against PCPS if the district revises the calendar.

customSections.label: Polk County School Calendar by City
customSections.content: Families often search for the Polk County calendar by city because PCPS serves a large county rather than one single municipality. The district-wide calendar applies across Polk County unless a school or program publishes a separate official schedule.

groups.label: Common local searches
items: Lakeland school calendar families should use the Polk County Public Schools district calendar for first day, holidays, breaks, and early dismissal dates.
Winter Haven school calendar searches also map to the PCPS district calendar unless a school announces a separate campus event.
Bartow, Haines City, Lake Wales, and Auburndale families should check PCPS for district-wide dates and then confirm school-level events with their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Polk Families
content: Track the ten student early dismissal dates separately because Polk releases students 150 minutes early on each listed date.
Watch storm make-up days before booking non-refundable travel around fall break, winter break, and the last student day.
Use teacher workdays and staff development days as no-school planning dates for students.
Check the official PCPS calendar page for revisions because the PDFs state that dates are subject to change.

compareIntro: Compare the Polk County school calendar with other Florida district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Polk County calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Polk County Public Schools instructional calendar PDFs for students, teachers, and paraeducators.

districtFaqs.q: Does Polk County list storm make-up days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Polk lists storm make-up days on each instructional calendar and warns families not to buy non-refundable travel tickets in case those dates are used.

districtFaqs.q: How early are Polk County early dismissal days?
districtFaqs.a: The official calendar states that students are dismissed 150 minutes, or 2.5 hours, early on each student early dismissal date.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute Polk calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Polk County Public Schools calendar page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with PCPS.
